projects.name: Mattermost
projects.short_description: Secure open-source collaboration platform for teams.
projects.description: Mattermost is an open-source collaboration platform for secure team communication, project coordination, and workflow integration. It is built for technical and operational teams that need reliable, self-hosted, and customizable collaboration infrastructure.

form.question: How to support
form.response: Open issues or contribute to open help wanted issues

form.question: A small brief about your project
form.response: Mattermost is an open-source collaboration platform focused on secure communication, operational reliability, and extensibility. It helps teams collaborate through messaging, integrations, and workflows while giving them control over their deployment and data.

form.question: One FOSS maintainer lesson for your younger self
form.response: Maintaining is not just about writing code. Good communication, reviewing consistently, and documentation matter just as much as shipping features.

form.question: Why do you do it? Why do you bother maintaining a FOSS project?
form.response: I started my developer journey through open source. I learned more about software engineering from open source than from any professional course, so maintaining and contributing is my way of giving back to the community that shaped me.

form.question: If your repo had a theme song, what would it be?
Which file in your project would you most like to set on fire?
form.response: Virtualized lists and a few outdated but critically dependent libraries.

form.question: What's your open-source villain origin story?
If you had to use one emoji to convey what it is like to be a FOSS maintainer, what would it be?
